items.name_en: 💰M12617 Top-tier Original Pooch Bag Dynamic Code This model. The Pooch Bag condenses Louis Vuitton classic design elements into a compact structure. The Monogram canvas body features vintage edging, leather is used for the top handle, handle attachments, and adjustable shoulder strap, creating a comfortable handheld and crossbody experience. The LV Lovers tag showcases Pharrell Williams' creative touch. 18.0 x 28.0 x 19.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: 💰Matte Black with Calfskin_24cm
items.name_cn:
💰Matte Black with Calfskin_24cm
#Monogram college#
A timeless messenger bag, a hot bestseller 24cm, a street style essential, the top choice for many Hollywood stars and goddesses. It looks good with any outfit, no matter how you pair it. Casual wear looks casual and cool, while formal wear looks elegant and luxurious. A bag suitable for any occasion!! This year's it bag is definitely you!
Model: 392737
Size: 24x17x6cm

items.name_en: 💰Medium Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Adorned with signature FF decoration in matching patent leather. Features a knotted long calfskin pull tab, with an internal lined compartment featuring a zip pocket, and silver hardware. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody carrying.

items.name_en: 💰Niki Lambskin_28cm
items.name_cn:
💰Niki Lambskin_28cm
For the spring/summer Niki lambskin, the metal chain has been replaced with a substantial gold chain, adding elegance and luxury to the bag. It's not overly trendy but still shows personality—a truly special bag! Using exclusive ZP original leather and highest-grade solid copper hardware, it definitely has that authentic ZP feel.
Model: 498894
Size: 28x20.5x8.5cm

items.name_en: 💰Sade hobo_Shoulder/Crossbody Bag
items.name_cn:
💰Sade hobo_Shoulder/Crossbody Bag
Imported Italian lambskin material, super soft and smooth. This versatile handbag features a folded top handle and a detachable shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. Comes with a fine long chain. A small bag that fits a phone perfectly, can be carried by hand or crossbody. So exquisite!
